# BUILD_VERSION

****

The CloudKit JS build number.

## Declaration

```swift
const String BUILD_VERSION;
```

## Constants

- **CLOUDKIT_LOADED**: An event that is fired when CloudKit JS is loaded. Used when `CloudKit.js` is loaded asynchronously.
- **VERSION**: The version of CloudKit JS.
